name: Alma the Meme Tree
description: A 1-of-1 living Meme Tree. Alma is the soul-tree: a head grown from countless tiny portraits and memories, swirling against a painted sky. 100% of its mint price became permanent WATER backing in the Water vault. Every harvest, half its yield grows the tree and half buys Meme for Trees for whoever owns it. The backing is permanent and can never be withdrawn - this is an art purchase with a living yield feature, not a deposit. Rewards are yield-funded meme token drops; their value varies with the market and nothing is guaranteed.
